calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: All parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

Appearances: Joseph Urbanski for Kathy Robinson (Petitioner). Gregory Leigh (Additional Protected Person).

Counsel stated that Kathy Robinson is the Petitioner acting as Attorney-in-fact for Phillip Steven Dye and that Mr. Dye is unable to attend the hearing.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's request is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Phillip Steven Dye and Gregory Leigh and not including Kathy Robinson. Attorney's fee is not awarded at this time. Respondent may be served by mail.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Attack, Strike, Stalk, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Harass, Destroy The Personal Property Of, Or Disturb The Peace Of The Person.

No Guns or Other Firearms.

Expires: July 18, 2017

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR#5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Weatherly.

NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Urbanski for and with Kathy Robinson (Petitioner).

Counsel informed the Court that the Sheriff in San Francisco County and San Mateo County were unable to serve the respondent. Counsel requested for a continuance to attempt service. The Court agreed to extend the TRO one more time to July 18, 2012 at 1:30 p.m. in Dept. 204 (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sonia Wong CSR #11288. Clerk: Ella Yip.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Text Ruling
